author: youzhixiaomutou
description: Maintain a Karpathy-style LLM Wiki with AI-assisted ingest, query, lint, and previewed file changes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: youzhixiaomutou
manifest.description: Maintain a Karpathy-style LLM Wiki with AI-assisted ingest, query, lint, and previewed file changes.
manifest.name: Auto LLM Wiki

name: Auto LLM Wiki

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Add stable OpenXML content fingerprints for `.docx`, `.xlsx`, and `.pptx` raw sources.
- Ignore Office `docProps/*` metadata-only changes so reopening files does not trigger repeated auto ingest or OCR.
- Keep PDF/images/legacy Office on pre-parse binary hashes and preserve text/HTML/RTF extracted-content hashes.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run build
- Bundle scan confirmed no dynamic script element creation in main.js

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Add optional automatic raw-file ingest for supported file creations and modifications, with debounce and direct application of validated model changes.
- Switch wiki log entries to newest-first via the new prepend operation and update README/settings copy.
- Remove bundled dynamic script element creation from dependency scheduler polyfills for Obsidian plugin review compliance.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run build
- Bundle scan confirmed no dynamic script element creation in main.js

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Expand raw source ingestion to support text/code files, HTML, Office documents, spreadsheets, presentations, RTF, PDF, and image OCR inputs.
- Add legacy Office support for DOC, XLS, and PPT, plus GIF OCR support.
- Document all supported formats and OCR behavior in English and Chinese README files.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Follow Obsidian's configured language for plugin UI text, notices, settings, review modal, and predictable errors.
- Add output-language guidance to LLM prompts while keeping JSON schemas stable.
- Publish updated plugin bundle for v0.1.4.

## Test plan
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Add raw PDF ingest support, including text-layer extraction and vision OCR fallback for scanned/image PDFs.
- Add raw scan diagnostics and PDF ingest progress notices.
- Add a settings-page OpenAI connection test button using HTTP 2xx validation.
- Update README documentation for v0.1.3 behavior.

## Test Plan
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Rename the plugin to Auto LLM Wiki for community submission.
- Update the plugin ID and package name to auto-llm-wiki.
- Rebuild release assets with the renamed metadata.

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description:
## Summary
- Align plugin metadata with Obsidian community submission requirements.
- Clarify privacy disclosures for API key storage and configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
- Publish release assets for Obsidian Community review.

releases.author: youzhixiaomutou
releases.description: Initial release of Obsidian LLM Wiki.
